[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7b/Theodor_Wegelius.jpg/250px-Theodor_Wegelius.jpg)](/wiki/File:Theodor_Wegelius.jpg)

Portrait of Theodor Wegelius

**Theodor Wegelius**  (7 March 1850, [Helsinki](/wiki/Helsinki "Helsinki") - 16 June 1932) was a [Finnish](/wiki/Finland "Finland") [politician](/wiki/Politician "Politician"). He was a member of the [Senate of Finland](/wiki/Senate_of_Finland "Senate of Finland").
